message:
fix: xxhash graceful fallback + pydantic test timeout

- xxhash package now tries native _xxhash C extension first, falls back
  to hashlib-based polyfill when the extension isn't available (e.g. in
  the pydantic-core WASM variant). Fixes langgraph/langchain imports
  that depend on xxhash.
- Add xxh128 aliases (xxh128 = xxh3_128) for API compatibility.
- Increase fastapi test timeout to 30s (heavy import chain).
- Pydantic variant: 9/19 passing (was 7/19).
